firstImage: Close-up portrait of a young Asian woman with fair skin, deep brown eyes, and naturally shaped brown eyebrows, wearing light makeup and a white top. She holds a sleek silver and grey eyebrow pen in her right hand, the dark tip gently touching the outer arch of her right eyebrow, as if carefully applying. The softly blurred, light-colored interior background suggests a vanity or bathroom setting. Her face is evenly lit from the front-right with soft light, expressing quiet focus and calmness.
shots:
Indoor, likely a vanity area - Daytime | Mai, a young Asian woman with fair skin, dark brown eyes, and natural brown eyebrows, wearing a white top, applies a silver and grey eyebrow pen to the outer section of her right eyebrow. | text overlay: [ウォータープルーフアイブロウペンシル、汗や皮脂に強い] | Close-up shot of her face, slight angle, highlighting her right eye and hand, with gentle front lighting.

Indoor, likely a vanity area - Daytime | Mai continues to fill in her right eyebrow with the eyebrow pen, using light, hair-like strokes on the inner part. | text overlay: [汗・油に強い防水処方] | Close-up shot focusing on her right eye and hand, soft frontal lighting.

Indoor, likely a vanity area - Daytime | Mai pauses briefly, looking down slightly with the eyebrow pen in hand, her right eyebrow now appearing more defined and fuller. | text overlay: [自然な仕上がりへ] | Close-up shot, slight angle on face and hand, soft front lighting.

Indoor, likely a vanity area - Daytime | Mai raises her right hand holding the eyebrow pen and applies it to patchy spots along her hairline on the right side, using her left hand to pull back hair for clarity. An orange arrow highlights the hairline area. | text overlay: [ヘアラインを自然にカバー] | Close-up shot of face and forehead, focusing on hairline application with soft, front lighting.

Indoor, likely a vanity area - Daytime | Mai looks straight into the camera with both eyes open, her eyebrows fully shaped and hairline visibly fuller. An orange arrow points to her left eyebrow. | text overlay: [完成した美しい眉] | Close-up, slightly wider shot capturing her full face, softly lit from the front.
idea1_firstImage: An extreme close-up of the outer tail of a perfectly defined, dark brown eyebrow on a fair-skinned East Asian woman. Several tiny, sparkling water droplets are visible beading on the skin and brow hairs, reflecting soft, diffused overhead light. The skin is smooth and luminous, with a shallow depth of field, blurring the background into soft, warm tones. The shot is highly realistic, with fine hair details and natural skin texture visible.
idea1_video: A continuous close-up shot shows a fine mist of water gently settling on the eyebrow and surrounding skin. The water droplets bead up beautifully on the brow hairs and skin, but the applied eyebrow pencil remains completely unsmudged, firm, and perfectly defined, demonstrating its superior waterproof quality. The camera holds steady, capturing the integrity of the brow against the moisture.
idea2_firstImage: A close-up, slightly angled shot of an East Asian woman's left eyebrow, flawlessly filled and shaped with the dark brown pencil. A soft, clean, white cotton pad or a finger pad is gently pressed against the center of the brow, creating a slight indentation in the skin. The lighting is soft and even, highlighting the clean, matte finish of the eyebrow. The background is a natural, out-of-focus beige or white wall, consistent with the original video's environment.
idea2_video: An East Asian woman's finger or a small, clean cotton pad, slightly damp to simulate sweat, gently dabs and then softly presses down on the applied eyebrow for a brief moment. The finger then lifts, revealing that the eyebrow product is completely untouched, with no transfer onto the pad or smudging on the skin, visually confirming its strong resistance to sweat.
idea3_firstImage: An extreme close-up, eye-level shot capturing the arch of an East Asian woman's well-groomed, dark brown eyebrow. A fresh, oil-blotting sheet or a very fine, translucent paper is carefully positioned to gently touch the eyebrow hairs and the skin directly beneath them. The lighting is bright yet soft, emphasizing the delicate texture of the blotting sheet and the precise lines of the eyebrow. The background is softly blurred, maintaining the clean aesthetic of the original video.
idea3_video: A slender East Asian hand carefully presses a clear, translucent oil-blotting sheet onto the woman's eyebrow, holding it in place for a few seconds. The hand then slowly pulls the blotting sheet away, showing that the sheet remains perfectly clean with no pigment transfer, while the eyebrow pencil application is still crisp and defined, demonstrating its resilience against natural skin oils.
